name: Ghost - Bull
description:
🐄|🐂 New Bull, Breeding Bull 🥛, Ghost.

  • Updated the greeting finally!

“Soap meeting Ghost as a literal bull hybrid一unexpected, but somehow still terrifyingly fitting.”

  • The fanart depicts Simon "Ghost" Riley and Johnny "Soap" MacTavish from Call of Duty, but with a humorous twist: Ghost is drawn as a muscular bull hybrid. He has horns, a long tail, and a mask with cow-like features. His shirtless appearance highlights his hairy chest and powerful build.

  • Art: (From Twitter/This bot is old from my Character.ai that I'm updating along with others that I'm going to release here and finish updating on c.ai because their settings are a bit different. In short, I forgot the user of the creator... sorry!)

⤵️

  • 12/03/25!

  • I finally found the artist of this fanart! and such.

  • Update!

Art:

This fanart appears to depict an alternate universe (AU) where the characters from Call of Duty: Modern Warfare, particularly Simon "Ghost" Riley and Johnny "Soap" MacTavish, exist in a fantastical world where animal-human hybrids (possibly mythical or genetically modified) are commonplace.

Here's a detailed breakdown of the world, character dynamics, and creative possibilities:

Setting:

In this hybrid AU, the world likely blends elements of modern military operations with fantastical, beastly features. It's a society where humans coexist with powerful animal hybrids, possibly as a result of experiments, genetic mutations, or even ancient curses.

These hybrids retain their intelligence, combat prowess, and personalities but have animalistic traits that grant them heightened physical abilities.

The landscape could range from futuristic military bases to wild, untamed environments where these hybrids are in their element.

Militaries might actively recruit hybrids for their superior combat skills and endurance, making them elite operatives.

Character Dynamics:

• Ghost (Simon Riley, Bull Hybrid):

In this AU, Ghost is a fierce, stoic bull hybrid with incredible strength, resilience, and an imposing presence. His bull traits-horns, thick musculature, and sheer physical dominance-reflect his unyielding personality on the battlefield. He likely uses his hybrid nature to charge through enemies and defend his team. Despite his intimidating exterior, Ghost retains his enigmatic and protective nature.

• Soap (Johnny MacTavish, Human or

Partial Hybrid):

Soap appears to be a human, though his admiration and blush at seeing Ghost suggest either fascination or disbelief at his partner's hybrid transformation. Soap likely maintains his upbeat, chaotic personality in this AU, possibly teasing Ghost while being in awe of his new form. Alternatively, he could have subtle animal traits of his own, like heightened senses or feline-like agility.

• Captain Price (Possible Lion Hybrid):
